zh-CN.name: 摄影师
zh-CN.intro: 摄影师是用相机拍照片的人。他们能抓住最美丽的瞬间，把快乐的记忆永远留下来。

story.title: 📷小熊学拍照
story.body: 小熊得到了一台小相机，他想给家人拍好看的照片。可是，照片要么糊了，要么妈妈的头没拍全。小熊有点难过。这时候，邻居长颈鹿叔叔来了，他是位摄影师。长颈鹿叔叔耐心地说：拍照要站稳，轻轻按快门，还要找好的光线哦。小熊学着做，先拍了一朵小花，很清楚！又给爸爸拍了一张，爸爸笑得真好看。妈妈端来蜂蜜蛋糕，小熊赶紧拍下来。全家人都夸小熊是小小摄影师。小熊开心极了，说：拍照真好，能把幸福装进相片里！

knowledge.title: 摄影师用什么工具？
knowledge.body: 摄影师最常用的工具是相机，它像眼睛一样捕捉画面。还有三脚架，让相机稳稳的。镜头有不同的种类，有的能拍很远的景物，有的能拍很大的范围。

en.name: Photographer
en.intro: A photographer is someone who takes pictures with a camera. They capture beautiful moments and keep happy memories forever.

story.title: 📷Little Bear Learns to Take Photos
story.body: Little Bear got a small camera. He wanted to take nice photos of his family. But the photos were blurry, or Mom's head was not fully in the picture. Little Bear felt a bit sad. Just then, their neighbor Mr. Giraffe came by. He is a photographer. Mr. Giraffe said kindly: To take a photo, stand steady, press the button gently, and find good light. Little Bear followed his advice. He first took a picture of a little flower – it was very clear! Then he took a photo of Dad, and Dad's smile looked wonderful. Mom brought out a honey cake, and Little Bear quickly took a snapshot. The whole family praised Little Bear as a little photographer. Little Bear was so happy and said: Taking photos is great, it can keep happiness inside the pictures!

knowledge.title: What tools does a photographer use?
knowledge.body: A photographer's main tool is a camera, which captures images like an eye. There is also a tripod to keep the camera steady. Lenses come in different types; some can take pictures of faraway things, others can capture a wide view.
